# Generated by generate_m4_definitions.py --write.
# M4 ancient language roots and their engine-valid dialects.

antq_american_language = { # P10;CAH-XI; Regional naming foundation
	color = antq_language_color_antq_american_language
	family = central_algonquian_language_family
	fallback = inuit_language
	male_names = {
		antq_name_atahualpa antq_name_hiawatha antq_name_kitchi antq_name_nokomis
	}
	female_names = {
		antq_name_awenasa antq_name_mika antq_name_nokomis antq_name_winona
	}
	dynasty_names = {
		antq_name_hopewell antq_name_adena antq_name_dorset
	}
	lowborn = {
		antq_name_hopewell antq_name_adena antq_name_dorset
	}
	dialects = {
		antq_american_dialect = { }
	}
}

antq_andean_language = { # P10;CAH-XI; Regional naming foundation
	color = antq_language_color_antq_andean_language
	family = southern_yutonahua_language_family
	fallback = quechuan_language
	male_names = {
		antq_name_atahualpa antq_name_manco antq_name_rumi antq_name_tupaq
	}
	female_names = {
		antq_name_anahuarque antq_name_cusi antq_name_killa antq_name_mama
	}
	dynasty_names = {
		antq_name_chimu antq_name_moche antq_name_nazca
	}
	lowborn = {
		antq_name_chimu antq_name_moche antq_name_nazca
	}
	dialects = {
		antq_andean_dialect = { }
	}
}

antq_anatolian_language = { # P10;CAH-XI;PLE; Anatolian residue naming adapter with Greek fallback; it is not a claim of linguistic uniformity
	color = antq_language_color_antq_anatolian_language
	family = romance_language_family
	fallback = greek_language
	male_names = {
		antq_name_ariarathes antq_name_attis antq_name_midas antq_name_zeno
	}
	female_names = {
		antq_name_ariarathia antq_name_laodice antq_name_nysa antq_name_stratonice
	}
	dynasty_names = {
		antq_name_ariarathid antq_name_cappadocian antq_name_phrygian
	}
	lowborn = {
		antq_name_ariarathid antq_name_cappadocian antq_name_phrygian
	}
	dialects = {
		antq_anatolian_dialect = { }
	}
}
